name: hourly: a request longer than 3 hours redirects into the overnight flow instead of erroring or dead-ending (B9/F17)
comment: Locked decision: >3hr is an overnight stay, not a fourth hourly option and not an error. The half-built hourly row is Cancelled on the way out rather than orphaned — leaving it Enquiry would give the guest two open Enquiry bookings once collectDetails creates the overnight one, and recordEta takes bookings[0], so it could confirm the wrong row. Guest lands in AWAITING_DETAILS, which is exactly where WS1's date collection picks up.
